message:
feat(output): add TOON format support for token-efficient agent output

Add TOON (Token-Optimized Object Notation) output format support:

- Add isToonOutput(), printToon(), isToonAvailable(), printStructuredOutput()
  helper functions to utils.ts
- Extend --format option to accept "toon" in context command
- Support CM_OUTPUT_FORMAT and TOON_DEFAULT_FORMAT env vars
- Graceful fallback to JSON if tru binary unavailable

TOON provides 20-50% token savings for structured data output,
improving efficiency when communicating with LLM coding agents.

Closes: bd-3ou, bd-u6v

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -99,7 +99,7 @@ program.command("context")
   .option("--top <n>", "DEPRECATED: use --limit", toInt)
   .option("--history <n>", "Number of history snippets", toInt)
   .option("--days <n>", "Lookback days for history", toInt)
-  .option("--format <markdown|json>", "Force output format (overrides --json)")
+  .option("--format <markdown|json|toon>", "Force output format (overrides --json). TOON provides token-efficient output.")
   .option("--log-context", "Log context usage for implicit feedback")
   .option("--session <id>", "Optional session id to log with context")
   .addHelpText("after", () =>
